since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.68%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.87% · BTC +0.25% · Gold +0.70% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.68%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.68%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.95%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.30%, SKHY +4.65%, MU +3.22%, CSCO +2.94%, DELL +2.87%. Laggards: ISRG -12.95%, PUBM -5.58%, AMAT -4.59%, SPCX -4.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.42% at $125.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
